name: Rice
description: High-quality basmati and non-basmati rice with superior taste and aroma. Carefully selected and processed to maintain nutritional value.

name: Turmeric
description: Pure turmeric powder and roots sourced from premium farms. Rich in curcumin and natural color. Perfect for cooking and medicinal uses.

name: Tur Dal
description: Premium quality pigeon peas (Tur Dal) with excellent protein content. Suitable for domestic and commercial use.

name: Soyabean
description: High-grade soybeans for export with superior quality and certification. Ideal for food processing and livestock feed.
